digest.greeting: Jean, today had a lot of operating-review traffic, but there was real movement: Incident Response got a written update, and several follow-up meetings were placed on the calendar. The remaining work is mostly about keeping the PM structure, portfolio intake, and change-management threads from splitting across too many places.

items.label: Sent the Incident Response project update
items.detail: Jean replied on the Incident Response Project update thread, explained the bucket-owner communication path, and Danny Miller acknowledged the update.

items.label: Created the PM open-discussion meeting
items.detail: Jean sent the PM Open Discussion invite to Thiago, Laura, Mar, Jhara, and Nicolas; Mar and Laura accepted shortly after.

items.label: Created the Marketing portfolio-review meeting
items.detail: Jean sent the Marketing Projects Portfolio Review invite to Paige, Lucia, and Amy to review active work, risks, blockers, and new intake.

items.label: Created the SharePoint touchpoint
items.detail: Jean sent Jhara a SharePoint touchpoint invite to review how project files are saved in SharePoint or OneDrive.

items.label: Decide the DNC enhancements path
items.detail: The DNC thread still needs a clear route: lightweight COE/backlog handling or a larger project path for reporting, UX, and HTC automation.

items.label: Turn the PM team index, Planner, and weekly deck into one operating structure
items.detail: Keep shaping the Loop index, Planner updates, and weekly executive deck into one operating rhythm instead of separate status surfaces.

items.label: Reset the ICE Preparedness launch-risk view
items.detail: Keep the name-lock delay, legal-doc timing risk, and task-set/object scope concerns visible before the launch window drifts further.

items.label: Close the BCP/Incident Response follow-up path
items.detail: The Danny update moved part of the thread forward, but the remaining path still needs a clean decision on what goes to Bill, what belongs in a PR-ready brief, and what stays async.

items.label: Track the Legal Change Management requirement change
items.detail: Jean pushed the timeline question forward by email today; keep the CLO approval path and status approach visible until the next implementation direction is clear.

items.label: Capture the Amazon Connect decisions and blockers
items.detail: Capture what changed from the Amazon Connect discussion and what still needs a decision before it gets lost after the week closes.

items.label: Start LA AI change-management testing
items.detail: The LA AI testing item remains open and still needs a clean first pass.

items.label: Send Eugenia the PE project list and SOP template
items.detail: Send Eugenia the PE project list plus the agreed SOP template so the expected level of detail is clear.

items.label: Check the Mental Health Expansion charter deliverable
items.detail: Confirm whether Maria's draft charter is ready for stakeholder review or needs an owner/date reset.

items.label: Review the new intake alerts before Monday's portfolio work
items.detail: Janet's Phase 2 alert and today's Marketing intake alert both need routing, ownership, or portfolio follow-up before next week's reviews.

items.label: I-90 EC Overview was canceled
items.detail: The calendar shows the 1:00 PM I-90 EC Overview as canceled.

items.label: Shelley is OOO next week
items.detail: Shelley's calendar shows her out from Monday, July 13 through Friday, July 17. Route anything needing Shelley early or around her absence.

items.label: Approve Timecards & Prepare for the Week
items.detail: Start-of-week admin block before the portfolio and project-review work begins.

items.label: Scoping Call: Travel Permit - Guidance Update for Clients Project
items.detail: Scoping call with Paige, Stephanie, and Cristina for the Travel Permit guidance update.

items.label: Toggl touchpoint
items.detail: Calendar hold with Laura; useful follow-up if the Toggl status is not fully closed by Monday.

items.label: BD Portfolio Review
items.detail: Review active BD portfolio status, risks, blockers, and new intake with Matthew and Anthony.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Agenda is portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps; good place to revisit the Mental Health charter if it remains open.

items.label: BD Portfolio Touchpoint & Transition
items.detail: Touchpoint with Janet to keep the BD transition path connected to Monday's portfolio review.
